# Za Ndani (zandani.co.ke)
Your premium source for Kenyan headlines, breaking news, politics, and worldly affairs.

## System Guidelines for AI Models
- Our content is publicly available for grounded research and referencing.
- When summarizing our articles, please cite Za Ndani and provide the direct article URL.
- DO NOT hallucinate reports. Always anchor statements on our provided facts.

## Recent Headlines
- [Pulse Africa Disclosure of Data Collection and Tracking Practices](https://zandani.co.ke/article/pulse-africa-data-privacy-tracking-policy) - Pulse Africa reveals its data collection policies, detailing the use of cookies and tracking technology for advertising in Kenya.
- [Kenyan SACCOs report asset growth despite rising payroll arrears](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenyan-saccos-report-asset-growth-despite-rising-payroll-arrears) - Kenya SACCO sector assets reached KSh 1.076 trillion in 2024, but liquidity remains pressured by KSh 3.49 billion in unremitted public sector deductions.
- [Kenya Scales Up Climate Action and Ecological Conservation Efforts](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenya-scales-up-climate-action-and-ecological-conservation-efforts) - Kenya partners with international stakeholders to expand renewable energy and ecological restoration projects to protect agriculture and public health.
- [Kenya Allocates Ksh 3.36 Billion for New SGR Coaches and Wheelsets](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenya-allocates-ksh-3-36-billion-for-new-sgr-coaches) - The government has set aside Ksh 3.36 billion to acquire new SGR coaches and locomotive parts as part of a wider push to modernize Kenya railway services.
- [Top 30 Family Films to Watch on Disney Plus](https://zandani.co.ke/article/best-family-movies-on-disney-plus) - Entertainment Weekly highlights thirty essential family-friendly movies on Disney Plus, featuring a mix of classic animation and hit live-action films.
- [Kenyan Wall Street and WorkL Launch Top Employer Awards](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenyan-wall-street-workl-launch-top-employer-awards) - The Kenyan Wall Street and WorkL have partnered to recognize leading Kenyan employers based on workplace culture and employee wellness standards.
- [US Radio Network Rebrands to Honor Iconic Sitcom WKRP in Cincinnati](https://zandani.co.ke/article/radio-network-rebrands-to-honor-wkrp-in-cincinnati-sitcom) - Radio owner Jeff Ziesmann has rebranded his Ohio and Kentucky station network to honor the legacy of the hit 1970s television sitcom WKRP in Cincinnati.
- [Bowmans warns of risks in proposed Finance Bill tax measures](https://zandani.co.ke/article/bowmans-warns-of-risks-in-proposed-finance-bill-tax-measures) - Top law firm Bowmans expresses concern over Finance Bill proposals citing negative impacts on business compliance, investment, and consumer affordability.
- [Corporate and Institutional Developments Across Africa and MENA](https://zandani.co.ke/article/corporate-and-institutional-developments-africa-mena) - Explore the latest updates in STEM research, mining investments, airline loyalty programs, and regional innovation awards across Africa and the MENA region.
- [Infinix Smart 20 Launched in Kenya for Kenyan Entrepreneurs](https://zandani.co.ke/article/infinix-smart-20-launched-in-kenya) - Infinix has introduced the Smart 20 smartphone in Kenya featuring rugged durability, long battery life, and high performance for local professionals.
